title: rubus × diversipilus
intro: Rubus × diversipilus, a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × diversipilus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Rubus × diversipilus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and well-being.
